<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\Mime\Encoder; /** * @author Chris Corbyn */ interface ContentEncoderInterface extends EncoderInterface { /** * Encodes the stream to a Generator. * * @param resource $stream */ public function encodeByteStream($stream, int $maxLineLength = 0): iterable; /** * Gets the MIME name of this content encoding scheme. */ public function getName(): string; }
